structured.title: Shopping Trip Gets Complicated
structured.overview: The speaker describes a stressful shopping run where they maxed out the trolley, ended up carrying multiple heavy bags to the car, and still managed to get most of what they needed, including pet food and cheaper items. They mention being rushed at the checkout, making a payment on the wrong account, then immediately transferring money from Monzo afterward. They apologize for not handling the money transfer the intended way because they were flustered and the cashier was waiting.

action_items.description: Transfer money from the food account
